title: carex crispa
intro: Carex crispa, also known as the curled sedge or crisp sedge, is a type of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae), native to Europe and western Asia. The Carex crispa plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex crispa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Carex crispa is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies and supplements.
